title: DENTAL CARE SERVICES - 211info
text: KLAMATH OPEN DOOR DENTAL CARE SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides comprehensive dental care services. Services include dental screening and education, cleanings, fluoride treatments, sealants, extractions, root canals, crowns, bridges, and dentures. 2074 S 6th Street Klamath Falls, OR 97601 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-6pm. 1st, 3rd, and 5th Wednesdays of the month closed from noon-2pm. Email (541) 851-8110 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 851-8110 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP, Medicare, and most private insurance. Sliding scale fee available for low income and uninsured individuals. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information for those applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Klamath and Lake Counties Services: Cavity Prevention Measures Dental Hygiene Dental Prosthodontics Dental Restoration General Dentistry Oral/Maxillofacial Surgery Periodontics Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING SETTINGS - BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON MOTHERSCARE OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - HEALTH CARE SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. KLAMATH OPEN DOOR
